prose: The attempt to run the Fukui reactivity task on ferrocene using the GFN2-xTB method in the gas phase failed because the argument `--phase` is not recognized by the chemkit tool. The supported arguments do not include `--phase`, and it appears the method expects the default gas phase setting without needing a specific flag. I will retry the task omitting the unrecognized argument.
